title: citrus suavissima
intro: Citrus suavissima, also known as the yuzu, is a citrus plant native to East Asia and is a hybrid of a sour orange and a lemon. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu due to its high concentration of vitamin C. The health benefits of citrus suavissima include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and marmalades, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
